query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph showing two overlapping views of the same person with light-toned hair, seen from below in profile. The lower figure rests with eyes closed, illuminated by a strong directional light that catches the forehead, nose, lips, and ear, while clad in a dark crew-neck garment. The upper figure appears tilted back with mouth slightly open, positioned above and behind the lower head. The background consists of out-of-focus circular highlights against deep darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white photograph showing two overlapping exposures of the same person with light-toned hair, creating a ghostly double image seen from below in profile. The lower figure rests with eyes closed, illuminated by a strong directional light that catches the forehead, nose, lips, and ear, while clad in a dark crew-neck garment; the upper figure appears tilted back with mouth slightly open, positioned above and behind the lower head in a surreal, dreamlike stacking. The background consists of out-of-focus circular highlights against a deeply oppressive darkness that crushes shadows into a suffocating, heavy atmosphere.
